member.name: T:Meridian.FSharp.Ledger.ReconciliationRun
member.summary: Summary of one executed reconciliation run

member.name: T:Meridian.FSharp.Ledger.ReconciliationRunStatus
member.summary: Lifecycle status of a reconciliation run

member.name: T:Meridian.FSharp.Ledger.BreakRecord
member.summary: Immutable record representing one identified break found in a reconciliation run

member.name: T:Meridian.FSharp.Ledger.LedgerBreakClassification
member.summary: Structural classification of a ledger break

member.name: T:Meridian.FSharp.Ledger.BreakSeverity
member.summary: Severity of a ledger reconciliation break

member.name: T:Meridian.FSharp.Ledger.MatchCandidate
member.summary: A projected-vs-actual candidate pair submitted for rule evaluation

member.name: T:Meridian.FSharp.Ledger.MatchOutcome
member.summary: Outcome of evaluating a matching rule against one candidate pair

member.name: T:Meridian.FSharp.Ledger.MatchingRule
member.summary: Configuration for a ledger matching rule

member.name: T:Meridian.FSharp.Ledger.Posting
member.summary: Ordinals correspond to the C# LedgerAccountType enum: Asset = 0 | Liability = 1 | Equity = 2 | Revenue = 3 | Expense = 4 Debit-normal accounts (normal balance is a debit): Asset, Expense. Credit-normal accounts (normal balance is a credit): Liability, Equity, Revenue.

member.name: M:Meridian.FSharp.Ledger.LedgerBreakClassificationModule.severity(System.Decimal,Meridian.FSharp.Ledger.LedgerBreakClassification)
member.summary: Derive break severity from classification and nominal amount.

member.name: M:Meridian.FSharp.Ledger.ReconciliationRules.classifyBreaks(System.Guid,Meridian.FSharp.Ledger.MatchingRule,Microsoft.FSharp.Collections.FSharpList{Meridian.FSharp.Ledger.MatchCandidate})
member.summary: Classify all non-matching candidates into <see cref="BreakRecord"/> values.

member.name: M:Meridian.FSharp.Ledger.ReconciliationRules.applyBest(Microsoft.FSharp.Collections.FSharpList{Meridian.FSharp.Ledger.MatchingRule},Meridian.FSharp.Ledger.MatchCandidate)
member.summary: Apply a prioritised list of rules; accept the first match found. Falls back to <c>NoMatch MissingEntry</c> if no rule produces a match.

member.name: M:Meridian.FSharp.Ledger.ReconciliationRules.apply(Meridian.FSharp.Ledger.MatchingRule,Meridian.FSharp.Ledger.MatchCandidate)
member.summary: Apply a single matching rule to a projected-vs-actual candidate pair.

member.name: P:Meridian.FSharp.Ledger.MatchingRuleModule.strict
member.summary: Strict rule: zero tolerance on both amount and timing.

member.name: P:Meridian.FSharp.Ledger.MatchingRuleModule.default
member.summary: Default rule: 1 % amount tolerance, 2-day timing window, currency must match exactly.
